results.emptyHint: To display data, add at least one variant and one parameter
results.emptyGeneral: Compare options by criteria and choose the best. Works for products, services, vacation spots, cars, real estate, and more
results.emptyVariants: Variants are what you compare. For example: iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24, Xiaomi 14 for a smartphone. Or Maldives, Turkey, Greece for a vacation. Add 2–5 variants.
results.emptyParams: Parameters are the criteria you compare by. For example: price, quality, design, functionality, reliability. Set each a weight from 0 to 10.
